basic_details.job_title: District Panchayat Bastar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Programmer, Block Coordinator Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per General Administration Department orders.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Electronics/IT with 60% marks, Postgraduate degree with 60% marks, 3 years experience for Assistant Programmer, 2 years experience for Block Coordinator
qualification.details: Assistant Programmer (Contract): B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Electronics/IT with minimum 60% marks from a recognized university/institute OR Postgraduate degree with minimum 60% marks; Minimum 3 years of experience in government/non-government offices under various schemes. Block Coordinator (Contract): Postgraduate degree with minimum 60% marks from a recognized university/institute; Minimum 2 years of experience in government/non-government offices under various schemes.

salary_details.details: Assistant Programmer (Contract): Rs. 36168 Per Month Block Coordinator (Contract): Rs. 39488 Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on marks Computer Practical Exam Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Panchayat Bastar Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bastar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Panchayat Bastar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Panchayat Bastar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Panchayat Bastar recruitment is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Programmer / Block Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Assistant Programmer and Block Coordinator positions in the District Panchayat Bastar recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Programmer?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Programmer post, candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Electronics/IT with at least 60% marks or a Postgraduate degree with 60% marks, along with 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 21 years and 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the General Administration Department orders.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by District Panchayat Bastar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Block Coordinator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Block Coordinator post will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 39488.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for District Panchayat Bastar recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes the preparation of a merit list based on marks, followed by a computer practical exam and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the experience required for the Block Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Block Coordinator position, candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of experience in government or non-government offices under various schemes.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Panchayat Bastar, www.bastar.gov.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.
